name: jarvis-voice-client
buildCommand: sh -c 'python3 -c "import json, os; sha=os.environ[\"VERCEL_GIT_COMMIT_SHA\"]; json.dump({\"commit\": sha, \"short_commit\": sha[:7], \"branch\": os.environ.get(\"VERCEL_GIT_COMMIT_REF\", \"unknown\"), \"built_at\": __import__(\"datetime\").datetime.utcnow().strftime(\"%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ\"), \"app\": \"J.A.R.V.I.S. PWA\"}, open(\"public/version.json\", \"w\"))"'
